profile.title: Profile
profile.telegram_setup_link: Not sure how to get your Chat ID? See the guide
profile.os_list_placeholder: Select the operating systems you use

telegram.title: Telegram Setup
telegram.intro: Follow these steps to connect your Telegram account to both WatchTower bots.
telegram.step1_desc: Open Telegram, search for {bot}, and open the chat.
telegram.step2_desc: Click 'Start' or type /start and press Enter.
telegram.step3_desc: The bot will reply with your Chat ID. Copy that number.
telegram.step4_desc: Go to the Profile page, paste the Chat ID into the Asset Bot Chat ID field, then save.
telegram.step5_desc: Repeat steps 1-4 with {bot} for the Sentinel Bot Chat ID.
telegram.auto_open_note: 💡 Note: Telegram doesn't allow other apps to open a bot chat automatically. Once the bot opens, type /start manually.
telegram.verified_asset: Asset Bot Chat ID is connected
telegram.verified_sentinel: Sentinel Bot Chat ID is connected
telegram.not_verified_asset: Asset Bot Chat ID is not set yet
telegram.not_verified_sentinel: Sentinel Bot Chat ID is not set yet
